notes: Bug confirmed: Drawer component bar chart uses fill: 'hsl(var(--foreground))' with opacity 0.9 (line 112 of source code), which renders bars as near-black (foreground text color) instead of proper theme accent color. Bars are nearly invisible against dark drawer background. Should use a chart-specific color variable like --primary or --chart-1. Visual observation confirms bars appear as very dark/black rectangles.
